commercialRule: Inventra uses a stable installer identity; same-name Inventra versions upgrade in place and preserve app data.
releaseNotes: Installer changed to assisted NSIS mode so the desktop shortcut can be optional.
Desktop shortcut is user-controlled instead of forced always.
Start Menu shortcut remains enabled so the app can still be found.
Installer upgrade policy added: Inventra-to-Inventra should upgrade in place and preserve data.
Old EKlinics cleanup should be done only after Inventra opens correctly.
No SQL, app data, products, suppliers, orders, reports, inventory, or updater backend logic changed.
